name: Amada Co. Ltd.
lede: Amada runs two centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Chennai, covering CoE and IT, built over 30 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Amada office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Amada Co. Ltd. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Amada runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Chennai), covering CoE and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Amada's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Chennai, spanning CoE and IT. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Sales & Marketing and Customer Support for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all five decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Amada operate in India?
faq.a: Amada operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Amada have centers in?
faq.a: Amada's India footprint includes Bengaluru and 1 additional city.

faq.q: What types of centers does Amada run in India?
faq.a: Amada runs CoE and 1 additional center type in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Amada's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Amada's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Amada's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Amada's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
